title: Vedantu is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Vedantu is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Subject Matter Expert looking for your next big career move? Vedantu in Nagpur offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Vedantu:
Vedantu is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Child Psychology

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Life and accident insurance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Nagpur, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Vedantu!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
